hero.label: Made for Cartage
hero.headline: I want to help Cartage put Wilson in every shipping team.
hero.subheadline: Cartage is tackling a painful operational problem for manufacturers and distributors with a product that feels both practical and ambitious. I am excited by the chance to help introduce Wilson to prospects through disciplined outbound, strong follow up, and clear messaging that earns meetings.

whyCompany.title: Wilson solves real freight work, not just a demo problem
whyCompany.body: What stands out to me is that Wilson handles the actual workflow of shipping, from load creation to booking, tracking, and end to end management. That makes Cartage compelling because it is addressing repetitive, time consuming freight coordination work for manufacturers and distributors who feel this pain every day.

whyCompany.title: Early team, clear outbound expectations, big category
whyCompany.body: This role is exciting because Cartage is still early, which means strong SDR execution can directly shape pipeline and customer growth. The expectation to generate leads and book 10 or more meetings a month signals a team that values activity, learning, and measurable impact.

whyCompany.title: I have already built pipeline through outbound prospecting
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai, I was responsible for cold outreach, HubSpot management, and LinkedIn sequences, helping acquire 15 to 20 paying clients. At NextAfter, I strengthened my messaging and digital marketing skills in a B2B environment, which would help me communicate Cartage's value clearly to logistics prospects.

quote: I want this role because I like being at the front of growth, where consistency and curiosity turn cold outreach into real conversations. Cartage is the kind of company where great prospecting can open the door for a product that solves a painful operational problem.
